title: Fighter Command Liaison
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''[[New Republic Starfighter Command/Legends|Fighter Command]] Liaison''' was the position taken by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] after being promoted to [[General/Legends|general]] following the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]]. Antilles accepted the position only after a compromise with [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] allowed him to retain the right to personally lead [[Rogue Wing]] into combat.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=A Change of Command|book=The Jedi Academy Sourcebook}}
